messages.message:
What are the key features of your Pilates equipment?
你的普拉提设备有哪些主要功能？

Thanks for your question! Here are the key features of our Pilates equipment:

感谢您的问题！以下是我们的普拉提设备的主要特点：

Studio-grade durability – solid wood / aerospace aluminum frames
Smooth & quiet movement – double-bearing wheels + premium springs
Full customization – leather colors, logos, accessories
Safety-focused design – reinforced structure & stable performance
Easy maintenance – long-life components and after-sales support

If you’d like, I can also send you our full catalogue so you can choose the model you prefer, and then I’ll give you an exact quotation.

Hi, this is Johnny from Hesure Pilates.

We were in touch before about Pilates equipment, and I just wanted to reconnect and see whether you’re still exploring options for your business.

We’ve been working with studio owners, distributors, and equipment resellers on reformer setups recently, so I thought it might be a good time to check back with you.

If you’re still interested, I can help recommend suitable options based on your current plan.

Are you looking mainly for:

你好，我是 Hesure Pilates 的 Johnny。

之前我们曾就普拉提设备有过联系，我想重新联系一下，看看你是否还在为你的商业寻找方案。

最近我们一直在与工作室经营者、分销商和设备经销商合作进行改革器设备的设置，所以我认为现在是回访你的好时机。

如果你仍然感兴趣，我可以根据你目前的计划帮你推荐合适的方案。

您主要是在寻找：
studio setup
工作室设置
resale / distribution
转售/分销
adding a few units to an existing business
为现有企业增加几个单元

Thanks, got it — studio setup is clear.
To recommend the right models for your space, may I confirm 2 quick things first: do you prefer aluminum or wooden reformers, and roughly how many units are you planning for the studio?
Once I have that, I’ll suggest the most suitable options for your setup.
谢谢，明白了——工作室的设置很清楚。
为了为您空间推荐合适的模型，我先确认两件小事：您更喜欢铝制还是木制改革器，以及您计划为工作室购买多少台？
了解这些信息后，我将为您推荐最适合的设置选项。

如果你仍然感兴趣，我可以根据你目前的计划帮你推荐合适的方案。

您主要是在寻找：
studio setup
工作室设置
resale / distribution
转售/分销
adding a few units to an existing business
为现有企业增加几个单元

Thanks, got it — studio setup is clear.
To recommend the right models for your space, may I confirm 2 quick things first: do you prefer aluminum or wooden reformers, and roughly how many units are you planning for the studio?
Once I have that, I’ll suggest the most suitable options for your setup.
谢谢，明白了——工作室的设置很清楚。
为了为您空间推荐合适的模型，我先确认两件小事：您更喜欢铝制还是木制改革器，以及您计划为工作室购买多少台？
了解这些信息后，我将为您推荐最适合的设置选项。
